report.description: Grants received from Government and non-governmental agencies for research projects / endowments in the institution during the last five years
report.explanation: Evidence found includes institutional self-study reports from Riverton Institute of Technology, Greenfield College of Engineering, and North Valley University, which provide data on extramural research funding, externally funded projects, and funding agencies. However, some reports lack specific details, such as total research funding and funding agencies. Additionally, some evidence chunks only provide metric values for conference papers.
gaps: Specific institutional data with numbers and dates for all institutions
Documented proof from institutional records for Greenfield College of Engineering
Clear mapping to all required dimensions for all evidence chunks
Verifiable sources with page references for all evidence chunks
recommendations: Institutions should provide detailed and verifiable evidence of extramural research funding, including total research funding, externally funded projects, and funding agencies. Additionally, institutions should ensure that all evidence chunks are properly documented and referenced to facilitate verification.

evidence_sources.text: Riverton Institute of Technology — SSR Evidence Riverton Institute of Technology – Institutional Self Study Report (SSR). Current NAAC Grade: B+. The institution focuses on undergraduate engineering education with moderate research activity. tion’s (HEI’s) to upload the SSR along with other relevant documents on Institutional website. Thus it is suggested to create a separate NAAC tab/link on Higher Educational Institution’s (HEI’s) website and upload following documents till the validity period of Accreditation is over: 1) SSR submitted online, to be uploaded after DVV process only (.pdf format). 2) Data templates which are uploaded along with SSR. 3) Annual Quality Assurance Report (AQAR – Year wise). 4) Accreditation outcome document viz., Certificate, Grade sheet, etc.
